# Tight-arc boundary: a full-semicircle bulge where the discretized
# aisle produces many short chord-spines. Without path grouping the
# per-chord centering leaves stalls mis-aligned across chord
# boundaries; with grouping on, stalls tile continuously by
# cumulative arc-length and back against the arc wall all the way to
# its peak (x ≈ 330 for this fixture's raw_outer).

polygon outer
(0,0)
(200,0) arc=-1.0
(200,200)
(0,200)
----
polygon outer 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (0,0)-(200,200), area 40000

set stall-angle=90
----

generate
----
total_stalls: 87
faces: 10 (boundary: 1, interior: 9)
graph: 22 vertices, 31 edges (perimeter: 18, interior: 13)
regions: 1
